title: NAIS Agent Card
description: JSON Schema for the Network Agent Identity Standard (NAIS) 1.0 agent card. Validates the agent.json file published at /.well-known/agent.json. Every card MUST carry a mandatory detached EdDSA (Ed25519) JWS over its canonical body; the signing key fingerprint is published in the _agent DNS TXT record (k= field) and MUST equal signature.kid.

nais.description: The NAIS spec version this card conforms to.

cardVersion.description: Monotonically increasing version of this card. Increment whenever the card content changes so that caches and registries can detect updates.

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this card was last updated.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the agent.

domain.description: The canonical domain identity of the agent. MUST match the domain where the card is published and the domain used for resolution.

description.description: Human-readable description of the agent's purpose and behavior.

tags.description: Free-form tags for discovery and categorization. Tags are advisory hints used to narrow down agents in a catalog; they carry no normative meaning. (Replaces the removed 'capabilities' field.)

contact.description: Contact email or URL for the agent operator.

mcp.description: URL of the agent's MCP (Model Context Protocol) endpoint.

auth.description: Authentication schemes accepted by the agent, in order of preference. Absent or [{"scheme":"none"}] means no authentication is required.

chains.description: For wallet auth: blockchain networks accepted for signature challenges.

Payment.description: Payment configuration. payTo lives inside the signed card body; clients MUST verify the card signature before using any payTo address. x402 payments are irreversible.

type.description: Payment protocol. Only x402 is defined in NAIS 1.0.

payTo.description: Payment receiving address(es). Bound to the identity key by the card signature.

pricing.description: Either a single flat price string applied to every tool, or a map of tool name to price string. Prices are decimal strings denominated in the first listed asset.

McpSnapshot.description: An advisory snapshot derived from the MCP endpoint's live tools/list at generation time. The snapshot is ADVISORY for discovery; the live MCP tools/list is AUTHORITATIVE. toolsHash lets clients detect a stale or altered snapshot.

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the tools/list was captured.

toolsHash.description: sha256:<hex> over the canonical JSON of the tools array.

tools.description: Trimmed copy of the tools reported by tools/list, sorted by name ascending.

name.description: Tool name as reported by the MCP server.

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input, as reported by the MCP server (may be trimmed).

Signature.description: Mandatory detached EdDSA (Ed25519) JWS over the card's canonical JSON body (the card with the signature member removed, canonicalized per the NAIS profile of RFC 8785 / JCS). The kid MUST equal the k= fingerprint published in the _agent DNS TXT record.

kid.description: Signing key id: 'ed25519:' followed by the base64url-encoded 32-byte Ed25519 public key. Equals the DNS k= value.

jws.description: Detached compact JWS: BASE64URL(protected header) '..' BASE64URL(signature). The payload segment is empty (detached, RFC 7515 Appendix F).
